name: chrX_Xq11_pericentric_SD_blocks
description: Xq11 pericentromeric region with a mosaic of 30-300 kb SD blocks shared between Xp and Xq pericentromeres and with autosomal pericentromeric regions (chr3, chr16). Low gene density, dominated by pseudogenes; typical 'pericentromeric seeding' architecture.

architecture.internal_structure: Mosaic SD blocks ('seeds') from euchromatic donors; AR-flanking duplicons at proximal end.
